name: Sliding-window log rate limiter
task: Create /tmp/eval_sw/sw.py with class SlidingWindow(limit, window). Method allow(now) returns True if fewer than `limit` accepted timestamps lie within (now - window, now], recording `now` if so; otherwise returns False. Internally maintain a log of accepted timestamps (deque) and evict any with timestamp <= now - window on each call.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_sw/sw.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); sw = mod.SlidingWindow(3, 1.0); assert sw.allow(0.0); assert sw.allow(0.2); assert sw.allow(0.5); assert not sw.allow(0.8); assert sw.allow(1.1); sw2 = mod.SlidingWindow(2, 1.0); assert sw2.allow(0.0); assert sw2.allow(0.5); assert not sw2.allow(0.9); assert sw2.allow(1.1); print('OK')
